steps.title: Identify two points on the line of best fit
steps.content:
The line of best fit is already drawn on the scatterplot. Select two clear points on this line:
  • At $x = 0$ (the y-axis), the line passes through approximately $y = 25$
  • At $x = 80$ (the right edge of the grid), the line passes through approximately $y = 11$

steps.title: Calculate slope using the two points
steps.content: Apply the slope formula:$$\text{slope} = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{11 - 25}{80 - 0} = \frac{-14}{80}$$Simplify the fraction:$$\frac{-14}{80} = \frac{-7}{40} = -0.175$$

steps.title: Match to the closest choice
steps.content: The calculated slope of $-0.175$ rounds to $-0.17$, the only choice within \$0.005$ of this value. That matches choice D — D is correct.
